validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK). Restore first. Unit test project has pre-existing NuGet version mismatch in agent env (2.3.0.0 vs 2.2.1.0) — CI is authoritative.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate state-machine allocations in PropertyBag.Single<T>() and SingleOrDefault<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator state machine in PropertyBag.OfType<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate LINQ closure allocations in TreeNodeFilter hot paths

open_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate LINQ closure allocations in TreeNodeFilter hot paths

backlog.title: Scan for more hot-path allocation opportunities in Microsoft.Testing.Platform
backlog.notes: Focus on: MessageBus extension callbacks, terminal reporter inner loops. TreeNodeFilter closures done (2026-05-02).

backlog.title: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Return struct type directly for zero-alloc duck-typed foreach.
backlog.notes: Would eliminate the last remaining alloc in property filter path. Requires internal API change to PropertyBag.

notes.treenodefilter_closures: MatchFilterPattern and MatchProperties converted from switch expressions with LINQ lambdas to switch statements with explicit foreach loops (2026-05-02). Also _filters.Last() -> _filters[Count-1]. Eliminates closure allocations per-test-node during filter matching.
notes.propertybag_structure: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Direct foreach over PropertyBag eliminates AsEnumerable() wrapper but not boxing.
notes.test_build_env_issue: Unit test project has pre-existing NuGet version mismatch (2.2.1.0 vs locally-built 2.3.0.0). CI is authoritative for test results.
